title: Assistant Store Manager - KFC India Global Group - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - KFC India Global Group - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, KFC India Global Group in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About KFC India Global Group:
KFC India Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KFC India Global Group!
